violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by cutting board. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by cutting boards and a small bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
